posts.author: Michele_Decadis (Michele Toscani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Get Clear Insights with sumUp for monday

If you’re looking to make data analysis on monday easier and faster, sumUp for monday is the app you need. Designed to help you build reports and dashboards based on your monday boards, sumUp gives you the tools to quickly analyze and visualize data, from simple metrics to in-depth, two-dimensional analysis.

Key Features at a Glance:

1. Simplified Data Analysis:

  • Quick Summing: Calculate totals for key metrics in seconds, letting you get the answers you need without manual number-crunching.
  • Flexible Grouping: Group your data by board groups, statuses, drop-down menus, dates, and more, giving you flexibility to see the bigger picture.

2. Dual Widget Power:

  • Group by Widget: Effortlessly organize your data by grouping it based on board groups, statuses, drop-down menus, dates, and more. This widget gives you flexible options for viewing and analyzing your data in ways that suit your needs.
  • Two-Dimensional Widget: Gain deeper insights by breaking down data across two axes. Analyze and compare metrics across both X and Y dimensions, making it easy to spot trends and relationships within your data.
    10000344_2024_7_8_10_49_9_sbbzfmz1920×960 275 KB

3. Multi-Board Analysis:

  • Unified View Across Boards: Connect multiple boards to get a cohesive view of your data without switching screens.
  • Smart Date Grouping: Dive deeper into date-based analysis by grouping dates by day, month, quarter, or year, making it easier to track trends over time.

4. New Custom Filters:

  • Dashboard or Widget-Level Filtering: Now you can filter your data directly at the widget or dashboard level, helping you focus on the information that matters most.

5. Simple Exports:

  • One-Click CSV Export: Export your data instantly for presentations, sharing with stakeholders, or importing into analysis tools.

Who Will Benefit?

sumUp for monday is ideal for:

  • Project managers
  • Product owners
  • Business analysts
  • Sales and marketing teams

If you regularly need clear reports, accurate totals, or in-depth data visualizations, sumUp provides the simplicity and power to make it happen.

Getting Started

Getting started is easy. Just add one of the sumUp widgets to your dashboard, adjust the settings, and watch your data transform into meaningful insights in no time.

Visit the monday.com Marketplace to start using sumUp for monday today. For questions or assistance, our support team is ready to help, and a free demo is available to get you started.
